visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a lavender long-sleeved top and a black sleeveless vest, stands in a large warehouse-style store. She holds a light blue rectangular pillow featuring embroidered illustrations of various dog breeds. The background shows rows of clothing on display and high industrial ceilings typical of a wholesale club. (2) She brings a second, pink rectangular pillow into the frame, which features embroidered cats. She holds both pillows, smiling and talking directly to the camera while shifting her weight slightly. (3) The camera moves to close-up shots of the pillows. A hand with a green ring points to specific embroidered details on the blue pillow, specifically a Schnauzer and a French Bulldog. The textures of the embroidery and the fabric of the pillow are clearly visible under bright, even indoor lighting. (4) The shot pans across the pink pillow, showing different cat breeds. The woman continues to hold the pillows, posing and showing them from different angles. Shoppers are visible walking in the blurred background aisle. (5) She points out more specific animals, like a Shiba Inu and a Dachshund on the blue pillow. The video concludes with her holding both pillows together, smiling playfully as she moves them slightly to the rhythm of her speech.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 刺繡的動物. (2) [Slogan]: 刺繡動物抱枕 399元. [Subtitle]: 長方形抱枕 399元. 你是貓控還是狗控呢? (3) [Subtitle]: 好可愛喔. 我來看他的花紋. 雪納瑞做的特別漂亮. (4) [Subtitle]: 雪納瑞喔. 而且他這個紋路啊, 就是她這個底是有點十字格紋. 很溫馨. 感覺如果你開店放這個也很可愛. (5) [Variety]: 貓派狗派一次滿足. [Subtitle]: 超可愛的. 很值得. (6) [Subtitle]: 柴犬臘腸雪納瑞法鬥跟這應該是貴賓. 大貴賓. 然後跟我們的可愛貓咪. (7) [Subtitle]: 好這樣講出來大家就知道我們是貓控還犬控了. 這個是橘貓因為胖嘟嘟的. OK.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator and 2 shoppers walking in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long, straight black hair, wearing a light purple/lavender long-sleeved shirt under a black V-neck pinafore or sleeveless vest dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a Costco warehouse store, featuring tall industrial shelving, palettes of folded clothing (shirts and pants), and shoppers in the distance under bright fluorescent lights.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A light, upbeat acoustic guitar and piano BGM starts immediately. A young woman speaks with a friendly and high-arousal tone, introducing animal-embroidered pillows at Costco. The acoustic environment has a subtle indoor room tone. (2) A second female voice (likely the camera operator) chimes in with an enthusiastic 'So cute!' in response to the pillows. The dialogue is clear and takes center stage over the soft music bed. (3) The first speaker details the price and specific animal breeds shown on the pillows, using expressive intonation. There is no significant background noise interference. (4) The conversation continues in a casual, conversational style as they discuss individual animal features, maintaining a positive and happy valence until the music fades out at the end.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Showcase -> Product Detail -> Engagement
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase and recommend affordable animal-themed embroidered pillows found at Costco, targeting pet lovers and bargain shoppers with a cheerful and informative presentation.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct showcase of the product, price (399 yuan), and the retail location (Costco) with the logo clearly visible.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A cheerful, social-media style shopping vlog that effectively uses close-up shots to demonstrate product quality and embroidery texture.
